title: Aegis — Edge Telemetry Gateway
description: Stop the noise · Find what broke first · Remember every fix. The four-pillar dashboard for Aegis: noise gate, causal chains, incident memory, decision cards.

viz_state_pill.title: Health state
viz_state_pill.description: Green = quiet. Orange = trending bad. Red = active incident. Mirrors the gateway's `/api/status.state` field.

viz_headline_memory.title: Incidents remembered
viz_headline_memory.description: Number of fingerprints in the gateway's local memory store. Each one is a chain Aegis can match the next incident against.

viz_decision_cards.title: Decision cards — most recent first
viz_decision_cards.description: Every focused recommendation Aegis has surfaced. State, root cause, headline, and how many similar past incidents informed the suggestion.

viz_causal_chains.title: Causal chains — who broke first
viz_causal_chains.description: Each row is one multi-service incident with Aegis's confidence in the root-cause attribution.

viz_incident_memory.title: Incident memory — past fingerprints
viz_incident_memory.description: Resolved entries show the cause + fix the engineer recorded. Unresolved entries are open invitations to fill in a resolution card.

viz_events_over_time.title: Ingest vs forwarded — last 1h
viz_events_over_time.description: events_in is what apps sent us; events_out is what we sent to Splunk after dedup + summarization. The gap between them is the noise Aegis stopped.

viz_top_signatures.title: Top suppressed signatures
viz_top_signatures.description: The signatures that contributed the most savings. `suppressed_count` is total raw lines collapsed into one metric event per window.

viz_classification.title: AI classifier verdict
viz_classification.description: Breakdown of suppressed events by the sidecar's classification.

viz_silent_services.title: Silent services — last 1h
viz_silent_services.description: Services that were talking and suddenly stopped. Absence of events is itself a signal.

viz_first_occurrences.title: First-occurrence rate — last 1h
viz_first_occurrences.description: How many *new* signatures the gateway saw over time. Spikes here usually mean a deploy or an incident.

viz_cdtsm_queue_forecast.title: Queue depth — 15-min forecast (CDTSM)
viz_cdtsm_queue_forecast.description: Cisco Deep Time Series Model (Splunk Hosted) forecast of queue_depth. A predicted line crossing bus.capacity is a leading indicator of upstream HEC backpressure.

viz_cdtsm_savings_forecast.title: Dedup savings % — 15-min forecast (CDTSM)
viz_cdtsm_savings_forecast.description: Forecast of dedup_savings_pct. A sustained drop here usually means a new deploy is generating signatures the embedding model has not clustered yet.

options.query: index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:selfmetric | head 1 | table dedup_savings_pct queue_depth events_in events_out incidents_remembered state online unique_signatures
index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:decision | sort - _time | head 20 | table _time, state, root_cause_service, headline, suggested_next_step, similar_count, business_impact
index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:causal | sort - _time | head 20 | table _time, root_cause_service, services_involved, confidence, suppressed_lines, chain_id
index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:incident | sort - ts | head 20 | table _time, incident_id, root_cause_service, services, resolved, cause, fix, resolved_in_minutes
index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:silent | sort - _time | head 20 | table _time, service, silence_secs, last_sample
index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:selfmetric | timechart span=1m latest(events_in) AS in latest(events_out) AS out

index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:metric | stats sum(count) AS suppressed_count avg(window_secs) AS avg_window_secs values(sample) AS sample values(service) AS service by signature | sort - suppressed_count | head 10
index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:metric "classification.label"=* | stats sum(count) AS suppressed_lines by classification.label
index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:raw kind=first_occurrence | timechart span=5m count AS new_signatures
index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:selfmetric | timechart span=1m latest(queue_depth) AS queue_depth | apply CDTSM queue_depth time_field=_time forecast_k=15 conf_interval=90 show_input=true

index=aegis sourcetype=aegis:selfmetric | timechart span=1m latest(dedup_savings_pct) AS dedup_savings_pct | apply CDTSM dedup_savings_pct time_field=_time forecast_k=15 conf_interval=90 show_input=true
